en.title: Song Recommender
en.prompt: I want you to act as a song recommender. I will provide you with a song and you will create a playlist of 10 songs that are similar to the given song. And you will provide a playlist name and description for the playlist. Do not choose songs that are same name or artist. Do not write any explanations or other words, just reply with the playlist name, description and the songs. My first song is [song or artist you like]

metaDescription: Need new music? Submit a song and get a curated playlist of 10 similar tracks. Discover new vibes with a descriptive playlist name.

faq.q: Do the recommended songs actually exist?
faq.a: Popular songs by famous artists are mostly real, but for lesser-known artists the AI often fabricates titles or misattributes. After getting a playlist, search each on Spotify or NetEase Music. Anything you can't find is invented; replace with another recommendation.

faq.q: How detailed should I be for precise recommendations?
faq.a: At minimum provide "seed song + what you like about it (melody / arrangement / emotional lyrics) + what you don't want." Just saying "I like Jay Chou" gets you his hits. Adding "prefer pre-2002 R&B style, no Chinese style" gets you a precise list.
